message:
🐛 Fix error extraction regex, limit targetResourceKinds to 3 (#540)

- Require colon/equals after error keywords to avoid matching prose
  (e.g., "error output, etc" was being used as an error message)
- Limit targetResourceKinds to 3 (was 8, caused over-specification)
- Align buildDescription error regex with buildDetailedSteps

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
